tasks.label: 3 - Abrir Emulador 8081
tasks.command: adb -s emulator-5554 reverse --remove-all; adb -s emulator-5554 reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081; adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.festhausgame; adb -s emulator-5554 shell am start -W -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "festhausgame://expo-development-client/?url=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A8081"

tasks.label: 4 - Abrir Celular 8082
tasks.command: adb -s SC8T5LBMVKWKWWP7 reverse --remove-all; adb -s SC8T5LBMVKWKWWP7 reverse tcp:8082 tcp:8082; adb -s SC8T5LBMVKWKWWP7 shell am force-stop com.festhausgame; adb -s SC8T5LBMVKWKWWP7 shell am start -W -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "festhausgame://expo-development-client/?url=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A8082"

tasks.label: 5 - Logs Emulador
tasks.command: adb -s emulator-5554 logcat | findstr /I "ReactNativeJS ReactNative JavascriptException AndroidRuntime expo com.festhausgame 8081"

tasks.label: 6 - Logs Celular
tasks.command: adb -s SC8T5LBMVKWKWWP7 logcat | findstr /I "ReactNativeJS ReactNative JavascriptException AndroidRuntime expo com.festhausgame 8082"
